sys_pd_activity.description: Verify with the server monitoring team that this is a total outage before proceeding.
sys_pd_activity.label: Instruction
sys_pd_activity.name: instruction

sys_pd_activity.description: A Major Incident has been declared. Critical infrastructure teams are actively investigating
sys_pd_activity.label: Send Email
sys_pd_activity.name: send_email

sys_variable_value.value: Prompts for confirmation of email subject and body before sending.
